Name.jp: アストラルガーディアン〈魔〉

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nThis attack prioritizes the enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Front Line</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on non-<color=#28d9ed>Ranger</color> targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n<color=#28d9ed>前衛</color>の敵を優先的に攻撃し、対象が\n<color=#28d9ed>スピード型</color>以外の場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間追加で付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하여 <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>전열</color>에 있는 적을 우선으로 공격하며 \n<color=#28d9ed>속도형</color>이 아닌 경우 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 추가로 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n优先攻击<color=#28d9ed>前排</color>的敌人,\n对非<color=#28d9ed>速度型</color>的目标,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率额外造成无法解除的<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>和<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: ワームホールクラッシュ

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. (Applied 2 times)
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>2個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.(2회 적용)
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。(可叠加2次)

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases Effectiveness by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.

Reduces damage taken from attacks that target all enemies by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
When hit by an attack that targets all enemies, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase Priority of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
効果命中が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。

全体攻撃で受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNする。
敵から全体攻撃を受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で味方全体の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
효과 적중이 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.

전체 공격으로 입는 피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소합니다.
전체 공격 피격 시  <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 행동 게이지를  <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
效果命中提升<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。

由全体攻击造成的伤害量降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
受到全体攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军的行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases damage taken from Light enemies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and reduces damage taken from other elements by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n光属性の敵から受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPし、他の属性から受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>DOWNする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n명속성 적에게 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 더 큰 피해를 입고 나머지 속성에는 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 더 적은 피해를 입습니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使光属性攻击带来的伤害提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,使其余属性攻击带来的伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> of Max Health or lower. Increases Attack and Speed by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>. This effect lasts until the caster is inflicted with Break. 

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: Grants an irremovable effect to the caster that increases Attack and reduces damage taken for 3 turns and recovers 30% Weakness Gauge. Enraged lasts for 4 turns.

<color=#28d9ed>Exhaust</color>: Used when Enraged ends.
Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>. (Applied 3 times)
This attack ignores the target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color>.
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下になると、<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わり、攻撃力とスピードが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPする。ブレイクすると効果が解除される。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:自分に解除不可能な攻撃力UP/ダメージDOWN効果を3ターンの間付与し、WGを30%回復する。【狂暴化】は4ターンの間持続する。

<color=#28d9ed>【エグゾースト】</color>:【狂暴化】終了時に発動する。
敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。その後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>3個を<color=#28d9ed>3</color>ターンの間付与する。
このスキルは対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を無視する。
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환하고, 공격력과 속도가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 증가합니다. 브레이크 되기 전까지 효과가 유지됩니다. 

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입</color> : 자신에게 해제되지 않는 공격력 증가/피해 감소 효과를 3턴 동안 부여하고 WG 30%를 회복합니다. 광폭화는 4턴 동안 유지됩니다.

<color=#28d9ed>이그저스트</color> : 광폭화 종료 시 사용.
적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킨 뒤  <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.(3회 적용)
이 공격은 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 무시합니다.
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态,并使攻击力和速度提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。该效果将持续至陷入力竭状态为止。

<color=#28d9ed>进入狂暴化</color>:使自身获得无法解除的攻击力提升/伤害降低效果,持续3回合,并使WG恢复30%。狂暴化持续4回合。

<color=#28d9ed>筋疲力尽</color>:狂暴化结束时发动。
攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(可叠加3次)
该攻击无视目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>。
